retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against current sc.com/pk product pages, CC_Summary_Box.pdf (SCBCPRMIDV123012024), CCPL_MID.pdf (SCBCPRMIDV008012026), Saadiq Credit Card MID (SCBPLSAADIQMID-CC&PF-08052026), and pk-annual-fee-reversal-criteria.pdf (effective 1 Jan 2026).

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year fee reversed on spending PKR 125,000 (or 70% of card limit, whichever is lower) within 3 months of issuance. Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit in 3 months after fee charge, capped at PKR 800,000 and floored at PKR 200,000. Waived for Priority Banking clients while Priority criteria are met; first-year waiver for Employee Banking and Premium Banking.

notes: Apply-now page surfaces explicit Minimum Monthly Salary / Income: PKR 300,000 (corrected from previously recorded PKR 50,000).
CC_Summary_Box.pdf Table 1 lists Mastercard Platinum primary PKR 14,000 / supplementary PKR 5,000 (corrected from previously recorded PKR 19,000 / PKR 7,500).
Self-employed minimum age is 25 per the product page.
No deposit/balance threshold surfaced for this unsecured credit-card product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year fee reversed on spending PKR 250,000 within 3 months of issuance (no 70% cap option). Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit in 3 months after fee charge, capped at PKR 900,000 and floored at PKR 600,000.

notes: Apply-now page explicitly surfaces Minimum Monthly Salary / Income: PKR 500,000.
CC_Summary_Box.pdf Table 1 lists Mastercard World primary PKR 18,000 / supplementary PKR 6,000 (corrected from previously recorded PKR 26,000 / PKR 9,000).
Salaried age 21+ per product page; self-employed 25+.
No deposit threshold surfaced for this unsecured credit-card product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Second year onwards spend-based reversal grouped with Platinum (1.5x credit limit in 3 months, capped PKR 800,000, floored PKR 200,000) per the 2026 annual fee reversal criteria PDF. First-year fee not published.

notes: Apply-now page surfaces Minimum Monthly Salary / Income: PKR 40,000 (corrected from previously recorded PKR 50,000; the landing page used to show PKR 50,000 but the live apply-now page is now PKR 40,000).

Titanium does not appear in CC_Summary_Box.pdf Table 1 (which lists Platinum, World, Easy Credit) — the bank groups Titanium with Platinum in the 2026 annual fee reversal grid, but publishes no headline annual-fee figure for Titanium in any current public document. annual_fee_pkr remains null.
Public pages clearly state salaried 21+, self-employed 25+.
Existing credit card or loan product (any bank) for >1 year is required per the product page.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year fee reversed on spending PKR 200,000 or 70% of card limit (whichever is lower) within 3 months of issuance; cash advance spend also counts for Easy Credit. Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit in 3 months after fee charge, capped at PKR 800,000 and floored at PKR 200,000.

notes: Landing page surfaces minimum monthly income > PKR 50,000 for Easy Credit.
CC_Summary_Box.pdf Table 1 lists MasterCard Easy Credit Card primary PKR 4,000 / supplementary PKR 850 (corrected from previously recorded PKR 3,000 / PKR 1,000).
Easy Credit is unique in that cash advance counts toward annual-fee reversal spend.
Salaried 21+, self-employed 25+ per public pages.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year fee reversed on spending PKR 200,000 or 70% of card limit (whichever is lower) within 3 months of issuance. First-year fee also reversed on digital acquisition (promotion valid till 31 Dec 2026). Supplementary first-year fee waived as a promotion till 31 Dec 2026. Employee Banking and Premium Banking get first-year waiver; Priority Banking gets ongoing waiver while Priority criteria are met. Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit, capped PKR 800,000 / floored PKR 200,000.

notes: Saadiq Credit Card MID (SCBPLSAADIQMID-CC&PF-08052026) explicitly states Saadiq Mastercard Platinum (Murabaha) primary Rs. 19,000 / supplementary Rs. 6,000 (corrected: annual fee was previously null).
Apply-now form shows income brackets starting at PKR 100,000 - 249,999, indicating PKR 100,000 as the effective minimum monthly income (corrected from previously null).
5% cashback on dining, grocery, e-commerce.
Salaried 21+, self-employed 25+ per product page.
Maximum card limit Rs. 6,000,000 per Saadiq MID.

gaps: Mastercard Titanium annual fee is not published in any current public SCB Pakistan document (Summary Box Table 1 omits Titanium; annual fee reversal criteria PDF groups Titanium with Platinum but lists no headline amount).

No public debit-card fee/eligibility pages were surfaced in this pass; the bank's current Schedule of Charges PDF available via search engines (pk-completep-schedule-of-charges-eng.pdf) is from 2017 and does not reflect 2024-2026 card fees.
